posts.author: tairogers (Tai Rogers)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Can you please add a phone number label to the CRM to allow the designation between an office number and cell?

What are you trying to achieve

I want to be able to see if a phone number is for someone’s cell phone or desk.
